{{Quote|I need to find a new hang glider to explore the Surabat River Valley. Can you help me?|[[Peekpa]]'s job posting|<ref name="Star Wars: Datapad">[[Star Wars: Datapad|''Star Wars'': Datapad]]</ref>}}
'''Hang-gliders''',<ref name="SWE">{{SWE|groups|ewoks|Ewoks}}</ref> also called '''Ewok gliders'''<ref name="SWH">''[[Star Wars: Hunters]]''</ref> or '''Ewok skin gliders''',<ref name="Ships and Vehicles II" /> were flying vehicles built by the [[Ewok]] [[species]]. They were crafted from beast hides and [[wood]]. While used primarily for hunting and transportation they could be utilized for aerial assault, such as during the [[Battle of Endor]]<ref name="Geektionary" /> by the [[Bright Tree tribe]] to attack [[Galactic Empire|Imperials]] alongside the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="RotJ" />
